extra:
Always hits
80% chance to greatly encourage this move if either enemy's accuracy level has been lowered three or more stages or player's evasion level has been raised three or more stages
moves.name: faint-attack

extra: If the target attempts to switch out, doubles in power and hits first
moves.name: pursuit

extra: User takes 33% of damage dealt as recoil
moves.name: sky-attack

extra: The next move used by the user will always hit, including semi-invulnerable turns of Fly and Dig
moves.name: mind-reader

extra: Base power is higher when the user has less HP, from 20 to 200
moves.name: reversal

extra: If user is above half health, removes half of its max HP and sets the user to +6 attack, otherwise removes no health and sharply raises attack
moves.name: belly-drum

extra: Sets up harsh sunlight for 5 turns
moves.name: sunny-day

extra: Can only be used when asleep, uses another known move randomly
moves.name: sleep-talk

extra: Has an increased critical hit rate
moves.name: slash

extra: Absorbs damage for 2-3 turns, then deals twice the damage taken to the opponent
moves.name: bide

extra: If the user is above 25% HP, removes 25% HP and adds a Substitute that will take that much damage for the user
moves.name: substitute

extra:
Becomes semi-invulnerable for a turn, then attacks on the next
While semi-invulnerable, invulnerable to all moves except Gust, Thunder, Twister, and Whirlwind
Gust and Twister will deal double damage.
moves.name: fly

extra: 20% to either paralyze, freeze, or burn the opponent
moves.name: tri-attack

extra: If no item is held, steals the opponent's
moves.name: thief

extra: Ignores accuracy drops and evasion increases and removes Ghost's immunities until the opponent switches out
moves.name: foresight

extra: If it misses or fails, deals 1/8 the damage it would've dealt to the user instead
moves.name: hi-jump-kick

extra: Performs an attack with 10 BP for ever party member with HP and without a status
moves.name: beat-up

extra: Can only hit sleeping targets, user heals 50% damage dealt
moves.name: dream-eater

extra: Decreases the PP of the opponent's last used move by 2-5
moves.name: spite

extra: User takes 33% of damage dealt as recoil
moves.name: double-edge

extra:
Charges on the first turn, then deals damage on the second
Does not need to charge in harsh sunlight
Deals half damage in rain
moves.name: solarbeam

extra: Restores 100% HP and cures status, goes to sleep for 2 turns
moves.name: rest

extra: Afflicts the opponent with Leech Seed, transfering 1/8 of its health to the opponent's opponent, even if the user switches out
moves.name: leech-seed

extra: Lasts 2-3 turns, then confuses the user
moves.name: thrash

extra:
Raises defense
Doubles the power of Rollout
moves.name: defense-curl

extra: Changes the user's type into one of its moves' types
moves.name: conversion

extra: Sets the HP of both the user and the opponent to the average of their HP
moves.name: pain-split

extra: User takes 25% of damage dealt as recoil
moves.name: struggle

extra: User takes 33% of damage dealt as recoil
moves.name: take-down

extra: If the user is a Ghost type, removes half of its max HP and inflicts a curse on the opponent that will deal 1/4 HP a turn
moves.name: curse

extra: The next move used by the user will always hit, including semi-invulnerable turns of Fly and Dig
moves.name: lock-on

extra: For 2-5 turns, prevents the opponent from switching and deals 1/16 HP at the end of each turn
moves.name: wrap

extra: Double's the team's defense for 5 turns
moves.name: reflect

extra: For 2-5 turns, prevents the opponent from switching and deals 1/16 HP at the end of each turn
moves.name: bind

extra: Switches to another pokemon, keeping stat changes and effects like Mean Look
moves.name: baton-pass

extra: If the opponent is sleeping, inflicts a nightmare
moves.name: nightmare

extra: Prevents the user's team from being afflicted with status conditions or confusion for 5 turns
moves.name: safeguard

extra: Transforms into the opponent, copying types, all stats except HP, and all moves with at most 5PP each
moves.name: transform

extra: Does double damage to opponents who have used Minimize
moves.name: stomp

extra: Hits 3 times, doubling in damage each hit
moves.name: triple-kick

extra:
Lasts 5 turns, doubling in power each turn
Doubles in damage if the user has used Defense Curl
moves.name: rollout

extra:
50% chance to burn opponent
Will instantly thaw the user
moves.name: sacred-fire

extra: Increases in damage every time when used back to back and the user takes damage
moves.name: rage

extra: Disables opponent's the last used move for 2-8 turns
moves.name: disable

extra: Deals half of the opponent's current HP
moves.name: super-fang

extra: Can damage with 40, 80, or 120 BP, or heal the opponent for 25% of their max HP
moves.name: present

extra: Copies the opponent's last used move for the duration of the battle
moves.name: mimic

extra: Prevents the opponent from switching out until the user does
moves.name: spider-web

extra: Removes the effects of binding moves, Leech Seed, and Spikes on the user's side of the field
moves.name: rapid-spin

extra: Can only be used when asleep
moves.name: snore

extra:
Ranges in power from 10 to 150, 70 is most common
Hits and deals double damage opponents in the semi-invulnerable turn of Dig
moves.name: magnitude

extra: Prevents the opponent from selecting any move except the last one it used for 2-6 turns
moves.name: encore

extra: Prevents the opponent from lowering the user's stats until the user switches out
moves.name: mist

extra: If the last damage taken was special, do twice the damage
moves.name: mirror-coat

extra: Has an increased critical hit rate
moves.name: crabhammer

extra: Scatters coins that are collected after battle
moves.name: pay-day

extra: Charges for a turn before attacking
moves.name: razor-wind

extra: Pevents being attacked for the turn
moves.name: protect

extra: 20% chance to lower opponent's special defense
moves.name: crunch

extra: For 2-5 turns, prevents the opponent from switching and deals 1/16 HP at the end of each turn
moves.name: whirlpool

extra: Raises the user's defense on the first turn, then deals damage on the second
moves.name: skull-bash

extra: Double's the team's special defense for 5 turns
moves.name: light-screen

extra: Sets up a sandstorm for 5 turns
moves.name: sandstorm

extra: Copies the opponent's last used move permanently
moves.name: sketch

extra: 10% chance to lower opponent's special defense
moves.name: psychic

extra: For 2-5 turns, prevents the opponent from switching and deals 1/16 HP at the end of each turn
moves.name: fire-spin

extra:
Raises evasion
Causes Stomp to deal double damage afterwards
moves.name: minimize

extra: Has an increased critical hit rate
moves.name: cross-chop

extra: Requires a turn to recharge after being used
moves.name: hyper-beam

extra: If the last damage taken was physical, do twice the damage
moves.name: counter

extra:
Becomes semi-invulnerable for a turn, then attacks on the next
While semi-invulnerable, invulnerable to all moves except Earthquake, Magnitude, and Fissure
Earthquake and Magnitude will deal double damage
moves.name: dig

extra:
Places a layer of spikes on the opponent's side that will deal 1/8 HP when an opponent switches in
Flying type pokemon are unaffected
moves.name: spikes

extra:
OHKO
Hits opponents in the semi-invulnerable turn of Dig
moves.name: fissure

extra: Hits an deals double damage against opponents in the semi-invulnerable turn of Fly
moves.name: gust

extra: If it misses or fails, deals 1/8 the damage it would've dealt to the user instead
moves.name: jump-kick

extra: Goes first, prevents being attacked for the turn
moves.name: detect

extra: Sharply raise's the opponent's attack, confuses opponent
moves.name: swagger

extra: Hits 2 turns after it is used, regardless if the user and opponent switch out
moves.name: future-sight

extra: Will KO the opponent if the user dies before its next turn
moves.name: destiny-bond

extra: Base power is higher when the user has less HP, from 20 to 200
moves.name: flail

extra: Survive all damage on 1 HP until the end of the turn
moves.name: endure

extra: rampage for 2 turns, then confuses user
moves.name: petal-dance

extra: For 2-5 turns, prevents the opponent from switching and deals 1/16 HP at the end of each turn
moves.name: clamp

extra: Prevents the opponent from switching out until the user does
moves.name: mean-look

extra: Has an increased critical hit rate
moves.name: karate-chop

extra: Will cause both the user and opponent to faint in 3 turns unless they switch out
moves.name: perish-song

extra: Hits and deals double damage opponents in the semi-invulnerable turn of Dig
moves.name: earthquake

extra: Changes the user's type into one that resists the last move it was hit by
moves.name: conversion2

extra: Varies in type and damage based on the user's DVs
moves.name: hidden-power

extra:
Cures status for entire team
Dismiss this move if none of the opponent's Pokemon is statused, Encourage this move if the enemy is statused, greatly encourage this move if the enemy is fast asleep or frozen
moves.name: heal-bell

extra: Lasts 2-3 turns, then confuses the user

extra:
30% chance to paralyze opponent
100% accurate in rain, 50% accurate in sun. Hits opponents in the semi vulnerable turn of Fly
